description: Archived resolved residuals from V1.31 post-QC tech-debt batch. V1.35 P0 (commits aafe1f8, 26b2fa8) closed TD-V131-01, TD-V131-03, TD-V131-04.

entries.title: Non-atomic queue claim race — claim_prompt_injections SELECT-then-UPDATE without transaction
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — claim_prompt_injections now wraps SELECT + UPDATE in a SQLite transaction.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; prompt_injection tests cover concurrent claim path.
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; prompt_injection tests cover concurrent claim path.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: Keyword LIKE pattern doesn't escape special characters
entries.note: Add escape_sql_like helper for user-supplied keyword values.

entries.title: Unbounded IN clause in mark_prompt_injections_consumed
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — batch limit 100 with chunking; runtime SQL guarded by constant column lists and bound params.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; mark_prompt_injections_consumed tests cover >100 ids input.
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; mark_prompt_injections_consumed tests cover >100 ids input.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: Unbounded prompt size in build_summary_prompt — memory/IPC risk
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit 26b2fa8) — content size truncation at 256 KiB with explicit [truncated at N bytes] marker; 2 new tests cover normal and oversized input.
entries.closure_evidence: commit 26b2fa8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; context_summarize tests assert 256 KiB cap.
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit 26b2fa8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; context_summarize tests assert 256 KiB cap.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: Missing prompt injection queue cleanup — table growth
entries.note: Add daemon maintenance cleanup for expired/consumed rows.

entries.title: JSON LIKE query performance on memory_fragments degrades with scale
entries.note: Pre-release volumes low. Consider FTS5 or keyword index at scale.

entries.title: parse_judge_response keyword matching can produce false positives from LLM output
entries.note: GO/NOGO word list matches substrings in LLM output. Consider regex anchors or parse first word of response.

entries.title: memory-augmented preset exit_when kind:rule without rule expression — may need explicit always_true
entries.note: P2 resolved: exit_when kind:rule is explicit always-true, locked by test memory_augmented_rule_exit_is_explicit_always_true. Loader treats empty rule as always-true (correct for this preset). Documented in YAML comments and embedded-presets/README.md.
